subject: Application for REF-2026-0408 - Senior Mechanical Engineer
bodyText:
Dear Hiring Team,

Please find my CV attached for the Senior Mechanical Engineer position (REF-2026-0408).

I have 8 years of experience in piping design and fabrication.

Kind regards,
Jane Applicant
+27 11 000 1234
